basics.name: JunHua Wang
basics.label: 王俊华
basics.summary: I am proactive, cheerful, and good at communication and collaboration within a team, able to quickly integrate into new work environments. When facing task pressure, I can remain calm, manage time reasonably, and advance work efficiently, possessing strong stress resistance. I am passionate about client-side development, willing to actively learn new knowledge and technologies, and grow continuously.

projects.name: Grade Management System
projects.summary: Designed and developed a multi-user management system to solve class grade management confusion and data security issues.
highlights: Independently completed the overall system architecture design, using C++ to implement student information CRUD and persistent storage
Designed and implemented a separate login system for teachers and students, enhancing data security via user permission management
Developed core data analysis functions such as automatic grade sorting and mean/max score statistics
Won 2nd Prize in the 'Think Big Cup' Programming Competition

awards.title: 16th Lanqiao Cup National Software Competition (C/C++ University Group B)
awards.awarder: Ministry of Industry and Information Technology

awards.title: 16th National Mathematics Competition for College Students (Guangdong Division)
